summary: Full backend and frontend testing of DeplyzeGPT Vision AI app after UI redesign to Claude.ai-style chat interface. All 7 backend tests passed. All UI flows working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 500 with descriptive detail message ('model not found'). The error message is informative but status code is 500 instead of a 4xx (e.g. 422/404). Frontend handles it correctly showing the error in the chat.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge visible bottom-right - expected for preview environment

action_items: Minor: yolo26-sem should return 404/422 instead of 500 for missing model (cosmetic, frontend handles it fine)
critical_code_review_comments: yolo26-sem returns HTTP 500 for missing model - should be 404 or 422 with appropriate status code
canSend requires inputFile to be non-null - works correctly, send button turns orange only after file upload completes
seed_data_creation: Test JPEG image recreated at /tmp/test_image.jpg (640x480px with random pixel variation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI fully redesigned to Claude.ai style. All test IDs: app-sidebar, new-chat-button, chat-empty-state, empty-state-suggestion, file-attach-button, file-input, input-file-preview, clear-file-button, model-selector-button, model-dropdown, model-option-{gemini|yolo26|yolo26-seg|yolo26-sem}, chat-prompt-input, analyze-send-button, user-message, user-message-image, user-message-text, assistant-loading, assistant-error, assistant-image-result, output-annotated-image, suggestion-chip. Flows verified: empty state greeting, suggestion chips, model dropdown open/close, file attach with instant preview, send button enabled after upload, yolo26 analysis result, suggestion chips after result clickable, new chat clears conversation, shift+enter adds newline. yolo26-seg fixed (no more 502). yolo26-sem returns 500 with clean error message.
